perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a Costco supermarket; a young woman with long dark hair is looking at frozen goods. (2) She points to and picks up a box of 'Wasabi Clams' by the Humble House Group. (3) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting where two women are sitting at a table. (4) They open a small vacuum-sealed plastic pouch of clams and pour it onto a blue plate. (5) They use chopsticks to pick up the clams and edamame, showing close-ups of the meat, and then taste the food while reacting to the flavor.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music starts immediately. A female voice asks a question, followed by another female voice excitedly identifying a product. (2) The music continues at a consistent volume as the narrator provides details about the price and brand. Occasional 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects play when text appears. (3) In the tasting section, the narrator's voice becomes more descriptive, explaining the flavor profile. (4) The audio concludes with a cheerful sign-off over the fading music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '你要買什麼' (What do you want to buy?) - functional dialogue subtitle. (2) '寒舍集團 銅板價' (Humble House Group, bargain price) - decorative hook text. (3) '55元山葵花蛤' ($55 Wasabi Clams) - factual/hook text. (4) '6入 329 總共有6包' (6 packs for 329, total 6 bags) - functional text. (5) '裡面主要的成分就是花蛤 毛豆仁' (Main ingredients: clams and edamame) - functional description. (6) '偏甜口的涼拌花蛤配毛豆' (Sweet-tasting cold clam salad with edamame) - descriptive text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Shopping Discovery -> Product Close-ups -> Home Tasting -> Final Review

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female presenters appearing in the tasting segment.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman is wearing a white shirt under a black vest; the second woman is wearing a turquoise turtleneck with purple hair bows.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First part is a supermarket aisle with refrigerated glass cases (Costco); the second part is a clean indoor living room with a grey sofa and a wooden dining table.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright indoor lighting and supermarket fluorescent lights.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Price/Value Evidence -> Sensory Experience -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a product recommendation vlog designed to inform viewers about a high-value frozen appetizer (Wasabi Clams) available at Costco. By emphasizing the collaboration with the reputable 'Humble House Group' and breaking down the price to a per-bag cost, the creators aim to persuade viewers of the product's affordability and taste quality.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed pricing breakdown, clear brand logo display, and positive taste review with a call to 'try it out'.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show style text overlays and fast-paced editing cuts.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows the 'Costco Must-Buy' content trend popular in East Asian social media, focusing heavily on price-to-performance ratio.
